Every Matt Stafford TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Matt Stafford has thrown 447 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Matt Stafford has thrown 25 playoff TDs which is about 5.6 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Matt Stafford has connected with Calvin Johnson for 58 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 67 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Matt Stafford has accumulated 7,532 yards. That's more passing yards than Colt McCoy (7,195) threw in his entire career.
